result.stdout:
Description:
  A tool that helps you generate translated .cshtml files and resources files for ASP.NET Core App.

Usage:
  dotlang [command] [options]

Options:
  -d, --dry-run   Preview changes without actually making them
  -v, --verbose   Show detailed log
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  --version       Show version information

Commands:
  generate-resx-view                                   The command to start translation on an ASP.NET Core project.
  generate-resx-csharp                                 The command to start translation for C# files in a .NET project.
  generate-resx-annotations                            The command to start translation for DataAnnotation attributes in a .NET project.
  wrap-cshtml                                          The command to start wrap the text in cshtml files with translation tags.
  auto-generate-view-injections-for-aiursoft-template  The command to scan all Controllers for [RenderInNavBar] attributes and extract strings to inject into ViewModelArgsInjector._useless_for_localizer() method.
  auto-dedup-resx-keys                                 The command to scan all .resx files in a directory and remove duplicate keys.
  folder-translate                                     Translate all files in a directory using GPT.

Description:

Options:

  -v, --verbose   Show detailed log
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

Commands:
  generate-resx-view                                   The command to start translation on an ASP.NET Core project.
  generate-resx-csharp                                 The command to start translation for C# files in a .NET project.
  generate-resx-annotations                            The command to start translation for DataAnnotation attributes in a .NET project.
  wrap-cshtml                                          The command to start wrap the text in cshtml files with translation tags.
  auto-generate-view-injections-for-aiursoft-template  The command to scan all Controllers for [RenderInNavBar] attributes and extract strings to inject into ViewModelArgsInjector._useless_for_localizer() method.
  auto-dedup-resx-keys                                 The command to scan all .resx files in a directory and remove duplicate keys.
  folder-translate                                     Translate all files in a directory using GPT.

result.stdout:
Description:
  The command to scan all .resx files in a directory and remove duplicate keys.

Usage:
  dotlang auto-dedup-resx-keys [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbose                 Show detailed log
  -d, --dry-run                 Preview changes without actually making them
  -p, --path <path> (REQUIRED)  Path of the videos to be parsed.
  -?, -h, --help                Show help and usage information
  -d, --dry-run                 Preview changes without actually making them
  -v, --verbose                 Show detailed log

result.stdout:
Description:
  Translate all files in a directory using GPT.

Usage:
  dotlang folder-translate [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbose                               Show detailed log
  -s, --source <source> (REQUIRED)            Path of the folder to translate files.
  -d, --destination <destination> (REQUIRED)  Path of the folder to save translated files.
  -l, --language <language> (REQUIRED)        The target language code. For example: zh_CN, en_US, ja_JP
  -r, --recursive                             Recursively search for files in subdirectories.
  -e, --extensions <extensions>               Extensions of files to translate. [default: html]
  --instance <instance> (REQUIRED)            The Ollama instance to use.
  --model <model> (REQUIRED)                  The Ollama model to use.
  --token <token> (REQUIRED)                  The Ollama token to use.
  -k, --skip-existing-files                   Skip existing files.
  -?, -h, --help                              Show help and usage information
  -d, --dry-run                               Preview changes without actually making them
  -v, --verbose                               Show detailed log

commands.payload:
Description:
  Translate all files in a directory using GPT.

Usage:
  dotlang folder-translate [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbose                               Show detailed log
  -s, --source <source> (REQUIRED)            Path of the folder to translate files.
  -d, --destination <destination> (REQUIRED)  Path of the folder to save translated files.
  -l, --language <language> (REQUIRED)        The target language code. For example: zh_CN, en_US, ja_JP
  -r, --recursive                             Recursively search for files in subdirectories.
  -e, --extensions <extensions>               Extensions of files to translate. [default: html]
  --instance <instance> (REQUIRED)            The Ollama instance to use.
  --model <model> (REQUIRED)                  The Ollama model to use.
  --token <token> (REQUIRED)                  The Ollama token to use.
  -k, --skip-existing-files                   Skip existing files.
  -?, -h, --help                              Show help and usage information
  -d, --dry-run                               Preview changes without actually making them
  -v, --verbose                               Show detailed log

result.stdout:
Description:
  The command to start translation for DataAnnotation attributes in a .NET project.

Usage:
  dotlang generate-resx-annotations [options]

Options:
  -v, --verbose                                               Show detailed log
  -d, --dry-run                                               Preview changes without actually making them
  -p, --path <path> (REQUIRED)                                Path of the videos to be parsed.
  -l, --languages <languages> (REQUIRED)                      The target languages code. Connect with ','. For example: zh-CN,en-US,ja-JP [default: en-GB,zh-CN,zh-TW,zh-HK,ja-JP,ko-KR,vi-VN,th-TH,de-DE,fr-FR,es-ES,ru-RU,it-IT,pt-PT,pt-BR,ar-SA,nl-NL,sv-SE,pl-PL,tr-TR,ro-RO,da-DK,uk-UA,id-ID,fi-FI,hi-IN,el-GR]
  --instance <instance> (REQUIRED)                            The Ollama instance to use.
  --model <model> (REQUIRED)                                  The Ollama model to use.
  --token <token> (REQUIRED)                                  The Ollama token to use.
  -c, --concurrent-requests <concurrent-requests> (REQUIRED)  The max concurrent requests to Ollama. [default: 1]
  -?, -h, --help                                              Show help and usage information
  -d, --dry-run                                               Preview changes without actually making them
  -v, --verbose                                               Show detailed log
